prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical product shot of a custom transparent smartphone case standing upright on a polished stone surface in a softly lit Japanese room. The case should fit a modern triple-camera phone, with a translucent lavender-tinted bumper, glossy raised edges, metallic rose-gold camera rings, visible side buttons, and a highly detailed decorative back. The case design features an anime-style shrine maiden illustration: a young woman with long dark navy-black hair, wearing a white kimono top and red hakama skirt with small red bow accents; her face is intentionally covered by a centered soft square blur/censor block. Surround the illustration with delicate sakura blossoms, pale pink petals, subtle silver cloud motifs, tiny glitter specks, and ornate molded corner decorations. Add exactly 2 dangling charms attached to the phone case: 1 red mizuhiki bow charm near the upper right with flower beads and tassels, and 1 purple braided cord charm on the right side with beads, a small floral knot, tassels, and a narrow paper tag with tiny Japanese calligraphy. Background: shallow-depth-of-field interior with blurred cherry blossom branches on the left, shoji-style window panels on the right, warm dusk lighting, soft pink and purple tones, and scattered sakura petals on the reflective tabletop. Visual style: ultra-detailed realistic photography mixed with premium anime merchandise aesthetics, macro product focus, bokeh background, cinematic soft light, crisp reflections, no logos, no watermark, no extra text except the tiny illegible calligraphy on the charm tag. Use translucent lavender, sakura blossoms, shrine maiden kimono and red hakama, and warm dusk cherry-blossom glow.
